site.title: SourceCode.Life
site.description: Your life is programmable. Rewrite your source code. Upgrade your life.

hero.subtitle: Rewrite your source code. Upgrade your life.

appVsLife.title: Fix the Source Code, Not the Interface
appVsLife.description:
You don't fix an app at the interface. You fix it in the source code. Life is no different.

To transform your reality, you must rewrite the underlying code of the self—the quantum code of the soul.

fur.title: FUR: The Inner Evolution Model
fur.subtitle: Fix → Upgrade → Run
fur.description: The Chinese term for spiritual practice, "修行", combines "修" (to fix) and "行" (to run) — closely mirroring the process of upgrading software.

quantumReality.title: Reality as Compiled Code
quantumReality.description: Apps are built from binary code. Reality is compiled from quantum code (energy).

hawkins.title: The Hawkins Scale: Energy Levels of Consciousness
hawkins.description: Dr. David Hawkins mapped human consciousness as a spectrum of energy frequencies. From shame (20) to enlightenment (700+), each level represents a distinct vibrational state. Raising your energy level is like upgrading your soul's operating frequency.

footer.tagline: Rewrite your source code. Upgrade your life.
